diagnostics_hook:
#!/bin/bash
INPUT=$(head -c 65536); FILE=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')
[[ "$FILE" != *.sql ]] && { echo '{"decision":"approve"}'; exit 0; }
if command -v sqlfluff >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  ERRORS=$(sqlfluff lint "$FILE" 2>&1 | head -15)
  [ -n "$ERRORS" ] && echo "$ERRORS" >&2
fi
echo '{"decision":"approve"}'
notes: sqlfluff is the linter. Configure via .sqlfluff with your dialect (postgres, mysql, bigquery). LSP provides IDE completion.
